creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ak
Date: Sun Apr 13 22:10:20 2014
New Revision: 351242
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351242
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351242/

Log:
  - Support STAGEDIR
  - Add license
  
  PR:	ports/188572
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>
  Approved by:	portmgr (blanket)

Modified:
  head/devel/py-ydbf/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/py-ydbf/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-ydbf/Makefile	Sun Apr 13 22:03:21 2014	(r351241)
+++ head/devel/py-ydbf/Makefile	Sun Apr 13 22:10:20 2014	(r351242)
@@ -11,6 +11,8 @@ DISTNAME=	YDbf-0.0.1dev-20080514
 MAINTAINER=	andrey.polyakov@unix.net
 COMMENT=	Yelded DBF reader/writer for Python
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 PLIST_FILES=	${PYTHONPREFIX_SITELIBDIR:S;${PREFIX}/;;}/${PYEASYINSTALL_EGG}
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
@@ -19,5 +21,4 @@ PYDISTUTILS_NOEGGINFO=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	YDbf
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGVERSION=	0.0.1dev_20080514
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
